EmailTemplate.description: Renewals email providing more information on Cyber Liability.
EmailTemplate.name: Cyber Liability Upsell (more information for renewals)
EmailTemplate.subject: Have you considered cyber insurance?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Your business insurance is now up for renewal with Kingsbridge.
Have you considered adding Cyber Liability to your cover?
Our Cyber Liability covers the cost of responding to a cyber event such as a data breach, cyber attack, or ransomware incident. Holding this type of cover can help to protect your business from the financial, operational, and reputational fallout of digital threats.
I’ve attached some information about our Cyber Liability cover in case you'd like to know more.
Or if you'd prefer to talk through it in more detail, or would like to get it added to your renewal quote, please give me a call on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
